config.entity_texture_features.property_.description:
Name
Matches to an entities name.
A value starting with "!" performs a negative match (not).
Examples:
 - Match string: "name=Pinky pinkyyy"
 - Match special formatting: "name=\u00a74\u00a7oPinky"
   (for best compatibility, use the escape sequence '\u00a7' instead of "§")
 - Wildcards using "?" and "*": "name=pattern:Pinky*"
 - Wildcards, case insensitive: "name=ipattern:Pinky*"
 - Java regular expressions: "name=regex:Pin(k)+y"
   (see http://docs.oracle.com/javase/6/docs/api/java/util/regex/Pattern.html)
 - Java regular expressions, case insensitive: "name=iregex:Pin(k)+y"
Any backslashes in the match string must be doubled.
Literal backslashes within a regular expression or wildcard must be quadrupled.
Correct:
  name=regex:\\d+
  name=regex:\\\\
  name=/\\/\\
Wrong:
  name=regex:\d+
  name=regex:\\
  name=/\/\
§anames.<n>=<name_list|regex|pattern>

consume it all, immediate effects are very likely to very kill you, so better prepare beforehand to cure your heavily diseased state somehow before there's no body left to cure.<br2/>After the immediate toxic influence ceases, however, long-term effects come into

play. You will forever cease to experience hunger in any form, and therefore will be rendered unable to consume most regular types of food. Though this effect might seem beneficial, the price for it is permanent feeling of unsaturation and significantly slowed down health regeneration in any of its forms.<br2/>Be aware that once the fruit is consumed, there is no way to reverse those effects - they will persist upon you

A rare relic that can be located among the treasures of ancient Bastions' remnants in the Nether, this fruit at first glance appears as nothing you could possibly want to bite. book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.eldritch_pan..description: The very bones of the universe, both celestial and eldritch, lay at your fingertips. And yet, you still crave more...<br2/>Fortunately, the unthinkable nature of Heart of the Abyss can be employed in this pursuit of yours. Less fortunately, another kind of insatiable craving now plagues your mind and body alike.

This boundless hunger demands that you keep hunting for all manner of creature that walk the lands of this, and many other worlds. Consumed by it, you cannot quite tell if this influence fully comes from the artifact that you have forged,

tetra.improvement.basic_handle/wrap/gr_c.description: Slightly increases damage and speed, reduces negative handle effects, simultaneously enhance corresponding spell strength.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.eldritch_pan..description: in your never-ending feast, are shaken. Those you struck down have not returned to tell the tales.<br2/>What, or indeed who, will be your next meal?

or it has become so deeply engraved in your soul that it will continue haunting you even without it.<br2/>The maw of The Voracious Pan stays ever-open, leading into what you presume is a stomach belonging to a vast entity of incomprehensible dimensions. Has this being granted you the Heart of the Abyss, or is it merely an entity that shares the same insatiable appetite you suffer from? It might be better not to know.

The promise of The Forbidden Fruit to quench any hunger once and for all is more tempting than ever, but you remain cautious. Things are never quite so simple for a cursed being such as yourself, and once you lose your ability to hunger, some other calamity will surely take its place.<br2/>Few dare to cross paths with you now. Ones that witnessed flesh torn and consumed, hearts crushed and forgotten, and veins sucked dry of blood

across items bearing them when exploring ancient ruins and dungeons.<br2/>Their effects vary, but none are quite beneficial - any cursed enchantment presents significant drawback to using

the item that bears it. Under normal circumstances, they would be just an annoyance for you to avoid. However, now that you bear Ring of the Seven Curses, there are ways you can manipulate them and even benefit from them, inaccessible to others.<br2/>This scroll, being infused with concentrated wickedness of the Twisted Heart, presents one such possibility. For every curse that every item of your equipment bears, it boosts

At times curses can take form similar to that of enchantments, with a only couple differences. Unlike normal enchantments, once they are bound to item, there's seemingly no way to get rid of them while keeping the item itself. Hopefully, regular enchanting techniques which you use yourself cannot accidentally produce such curses - but you may come

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.haste_potion..description: A type of potion that isn't as widely known as usable as common set.<br2/>Practical applications it can have are fairly obvious. It is mostly useful for long mining sessions, as it allows to tear through rocks and dirt at much faster rate. Besides that, however, it might prove to also be somewhat usable in combat, as it also makes your attacks
slightly faster and easier to chain up in short time.<br2/>Brewing it isn't any difficult - just fuse nether quartz into awkward potion, and that's it.

effect.goety.rallying.description.description: Increases attack damage of affected and their nearby allies by 10%%; higher levels increases damage by 10%%.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.19.description: Wealth? I have a pyramid full of gold. Do I use it? No. Do I let anyone else have it? Absolutely not. It's the principle of the thing.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.18.description: Someone and I had an agreement. He'd get my army, my servants get protection from the sun. But you know what they say about deals with necromancers? We always collect. Eventually. Preferably with interest.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.17.description: I could raise your entire family tree as zombies. And believe me, your great-aunt Edna (I made it up xd)still complains. About everything. You'll never have peace.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.16.description: Roses are red, violets are blue, I'll raise your grandma, and make her haunt you. ...What? You said poetry. I never promised good poetry.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.15.description: Roses are red, violets are blue, I'm already dead, and soon you will be too. ...What? Too soon? It's never too soon in necromancy.

item.tarotcards.the_hanged_man.desc.description: %s%% of damage taken is gained as experience

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.14.description: I could raise every corpse in a hundred blocks. Including that chicken you ate for dinner last week. Imagine that—a vengeful drumstick coming for you.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.13.description: Sometimes I summon skeletons just to watch them try to figure out doors. It's been millennia and they still haven't gotten it. Best entertainment in the Nameless Kingdom.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.12.description: You know, for someone who keeps resurrecting me and making me stronger, you're not half bad. A third bad, maybe. A quarter on a good day. Don't let it go to your head.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.11.description: Beneath the sands where mortals tread, I rule the kingdom of the dead. My bones are old, my wit is keen, your armor's uglier than it seems.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.10.description: Some people say 'live every day like it's your last.' I say 'live every day like it's someone else's last.' Much more entertaining that way.

commands.forceload.toobig.description: Too many chunks in the specified area (maximum %s, specified %s)

effect.minecraft.unluck.description.description: Can reduce chances of high-quality and more loot; higher levels reduce the chance of good loot.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: Four brains stitched together, and not an ounce of wit. But that muscle? Well-marbled, I'll give it that.You know, its keeper had more talent than those grey-skins—at least in the culinary arts.
This so-called Wilden Chimera fought like an angry bunny. But same result—ends up in the ground.

item.touhou_little_maid.sanae_gohei.tip.description: A gohei used for creating an altar after you constructed it. Maids holding this gohei can shoot danmaku at hostile monsters.

item.goety_revelation.quietus_star.guide.description:

selectWorld.backupWarning.customized.description: Unfortunately, we do not support customized worlds in this version of Minecraft. We can still load this world and keep everything the way it was, but any newly generated terrain will no longer be customized. We're sorry for the inconvenience!

advancements.husbandry.allay_deliver_ite.description: You've Got a Friend in Me

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: All flash, no substance. Wasting dozens of souls just to put on a fireworks show? If any of my minions pulled that stunt, they'd be back in their jars faster than you can say 'smoothie'.
Another spiritual expert who forgot that spirits need bodies to do anything useful. Mine come with bones. Much more practical.

commands.team.add.duplicate.description: A team already exists by that name

item.goetytwilight.twilight_focus.desc.description: Launch lich orbs, with a chance to fire explosive orbs.

gui.xaero_box_waypoints_selected_by_mini.description: Displaying waypoints from the same waypoint sub-world as you are viewing in game and on the minimap. The sub-world can be switched in the full waypoint menu.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.89.description: Age isn't everything. An old bone buried for eons isn't necessarily tougher than a hungry touhou little fairy maid.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.88.description: I've been watching you farm. Fascinating. Imagine my undead army with farming skills. 'Zombie, till row three. Skeleton, water crops.' Genius.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.87.description: This is my idle animation. Very intimidating, right? Just floating here, thinking about... what's for dinner. souls, probably. Always souls.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.86.description: Food, beauty, honor—true sages cast them away.No hunger, no lust, no desire for power—Only a great will flows forth!

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.85.description: My heart is empty, yet possesses all,for I have grasped the eternal mystery,and no longer need the shackles of the mortal world.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.84.description: What is the purpose of life, you ask? Meaningless pursuits,Meaningless joys and sorrows, meaningless heartbeats and breaths...Only change never changes,just as only death possesses infinite life.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.83.description: Weapons or magic... What you have seen, what you have not,I have set foot upon them all.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.82.description: You and I may be of the same kind, so come,let us seek the true meaning of eternity.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.81.description: To be or not to be has never been a question worth pondering,For they are ultimately one and the same.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.80.description: The Creators? Oh, they're the reason I exist. Also the reason I have to deal with all of you. Respect where it's due, I suppose. Though sometimes their design choices confuse me.

message.moonlight.anti_repost.description: You seem to have downloaded %1$s from a malicious site :( Get the real version %2$s.

info.goety.unholy_hat_cast.description: Halves casting time for nether spells. Wearing with Unholy Robe causes certain fire spells to deal hellfire damage.

mco.configure.world.edit.subscreen.exper.description: Some settings are disabled since your current world is an experience

selectServer.deleteQuestion.description: Are you sure you want to remove this server?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.99.description: Ur-Tsar, best chef in the Nether.His lava chicken is to die for-literally.Last batch raised three skeletons.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.98.description: I asked Ur-Tsar why he cooks. He said even apostles get tired of eating raw Nether Wart. Fair point. Even a lich needs a good meal now and then.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.97.description: Ur-Tsar? Now THAT'S a bloke who knows his way around a kitchen. His Nether stew? Fiery. Literally. Still warms the bones, even when you don't have any flesh left.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.96.description: Those who create worlds always like to delete things that 'don't exist'. I do the same with my skeletons when they annoy me. 'Removed Skeleton #47'. Very therapeutic.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.95.description: Some legends never truly die. You can try to bury them, ignore them, but they always grow in some dark corner. Like weeds in a graveyard—the more you pull, the more they spread.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.94.description: Just a little secret, Dark Mage. The Vindicator chefs in the Woodland Mansion marinate ravager meat with swamp crocodile entrails, then add loads of snap warts vinegar. It's a delicacy among the Illagers.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.93.description: I could turn you into a skeleton, but honestly? You'd probably complain about the lack of health insurance.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.92.description: Have you seen what passes for 'fine dining' in a woodland mansion? Creamy berry fish paste dumpling with chocolate sauce! No wonder he's always sad.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.91.description: Poor Vizier. All that power, a ruby that amplifies spells, and what does he eat? Whatever illagers consider 'cuisine'. I'd rather chew on soul sand.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.90.description: Magic domain GOAT? That's me, the Nameless One. Sorry Wine Fox, you've been outclassed.

option.immersive_aircraft.separateCamera.description: Use a separate camera in aircraft.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.69.description: Ancient gong, huh? Of course. You don't just text a 2000-year-old mage. You have to make an entrance. Ding-dong, your doom is here—with impeccable posture.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.68.description: Ancient Gong, huh? You bang it and they show up. Imagine being summoned like that. 'Quick, someone's banging a gong!' 'Ugh, again? Tell them I'm dead. ...Wait, I am dead. Fine, let's go.'

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.67.description: Parched shoots weakness arrows. How considerate! Instead of killing you, they just make you feel as pathetic as they look.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.66.description: You know those magicians who never shut up about the 'good old days'? Imagine that, but they're mummified and every story starts with 'back when I had skin...'

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.65.description: You know what I love about husks? They don't complain about the heat. 'Oh, it's too sunny, I'm burning, I need a hat...' Shut up, you're dead. Meanwhile my husks are just vibing in the desert like 'Ah, feels like home.'

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.64.description: I asked a reaper to help with gardening once. Now I have a very neat graveyard and absolutely no flowers. Lesson learned.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.63.description: Reapers. See that scythe? It's not for farming wheat. Unless... your soul is wheat. Then yes, harvest time.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.62.description: Wraiths. Ever wanted your enemies to literally feel the cold shoulder? Not fire, mind you. Fire is hot, passionate, so cliché. This is glacial flame—it burns cold, like your ex's heart.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.61.description: Zombies are the interns of the undead world. No skills, no speed, but they show up every day. You have to respect the commitment.

commands.locate.structure.invalid.description: There is no structure with type "%s"

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.60.description: Skeletons are the archery enthusiasts who never shut up about their bow technique. 'Oh, I hit a moving target from 50 blocks away!' Yes, Greg, we know. You've been dead for 300 years.

book.enigmaticlegacy.category.relics.des.description: Countless relics are scattered across this world, many forgotten in ages, others - persisted in legends...<br2/>And as both explorer and conqueror, they just so happen to be your primary point of interest, as they are keys for reaching unimaginable power, and signs that may lead you to the answers you seek.

item.goety.magic_bolt_focus.info.description: Shoots a Magic Bolt that deals small magic damage and summons a small pool of damaging magic on a target that's hit by it.

gui.xaero_map_selection_box.description:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.79.description: I should visit the ones who created all this sometime. You know, just to... thank them personally. With my army. And my best green smoke. It'll be an interesting meeting.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.78.description: They say the most terrifying opponents aren't the powerful ones, but those who never give up. I agree, but I think the most terrifying are those who don't even know WHEN to give up.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.77.description: (The Nameless One sings a ballad in a language you have never heard before. You cannot understand the words, but the melody sounds mournful.)

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.76.description: That Marb1e dude... always so watery. If he shows up, I feel like my pyramid needs a better drainage system. Stop flowing, dude!

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.75.description: I heard there's marble who's 'very tasty and juicy'. Is that a new player? Can I own one? For research purposes.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.74.description: Life's a joke, death's a punchline, and I'm the one laughing from the audience. Badum-tss!

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.73.description: Life's short. Then it gets long. Then it gets eternal and you're stuck with me. Really makes you rethink those life choices, huh?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.72.description: I don't think you need my power for the battle itself—if you truly want strength, those detachable war machines would suit you better. You just want to watch a... grand performance?

effect.alexsmobs.bug_pheromones.descript.description: Make hostile arthropods neutral to the user.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.71.description: 'Creatures of ancient ghosts unwilling to sink into darkness.' Sounds like someone had too much time on their hands. Or afterlife. Whatever.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.70.description: Parched Necromancers were scholars once. Read books, wrote scrolls, debated philosophy. Now they debate whether to hit you with wind or a tornado. Some things never change—they still love the sound of their own voice. Metaphorically. They don't have vocal cords anymore.

enchantment.enigmaticlegacy.sharpshooter.description: Increased and less random arrow damage.

death.attack.twilightforest.snowballFigh.description: %1$s lost a snowball fight to %2$s using %3$s

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.49.description: You cheat death so often I'm starting to think death is just... mildly annoyed at this point. 'Oh, it's YOU again. Fine, come back in. Tea's on the counter.'

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.48.description: Ah, the Transfer Gem. The marriage certificate between you and your soul storage. Beautiful. Just don't lose it. Soul divorce is messy.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.47.description: A soul arca? Fancy word for 'soul piggy bank'. Though I have to admit, watching you hoard 100,000 souls like a dragon with golds is... endearing. In a terrifying way.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.46.description: Kill the Wither? Five soul. The same as a chicken. I don't make the rules, I just laugh at them.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.45.description: Animals give five soul. It's a living. Or rather, it's a dying. For them, anyway.

info.goety_revelation.no_spells.description: Your magic has malfunctioned under the influence of the current domain!

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.44.description: You know, every time you cast a spell with those souls, somewhere a villager sighs in relief. 'Thank goodness it was his soul and not mine... this time.'

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.43.description: Wardens have 10,000 soul energy. You know what that makes them? Walking ATMs. Very angry, very blind ATMs that will punch you into next Tuesday. But hey, high risk, high reward. That's necromancy in a nutshell.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.42.description: Soul energy? Oh, it's not as complicated as the living make it out to be. Think of it as... the world's weirdest currency. Better than emeralds, because try buying a zombie army with green rocks. Go ahead, I'll wait.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.41.description: Enchanting? Cute. You wave some lapis lazuli around, mumble a few words, and hope for the best. I raise the dead and bend reality to my will. But sure, your Dark Anvil is very impressive. For a hobbyist.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.40.description: Reading a guide? How adorable. Back in my day, we learned necromancy by... well, by dying mostly. Trial and error. Literally trial and death.

gui.xaero_box_ingame_waypoint_icon_scale.description: Scale of the in-game waypoint icons.

gui.xaero_box_switch_to_auto_on_death.description: Whether to switch the waypoint sub-world to auto on deathpoint creation. This doesn't affect what sub-world the deathpoint is created in.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.59.description: Blackguards. The name says it all. They're slow, they're dumb, and they'll smash your problems into a fine paste. Think of them as the 'aggressive negotiations' option.

inventoryprofiles.config.name.scroll_to_.description: Scroll Items From Chest to Player

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.58.description: Vanguards? Oh, they're my pride and joy. Sharp as their blades, loyal as... well, as dead things can be. Just don't ask them to dance.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.57.description: Join my army! Benefits include: no taxes, no need to eat, and you get a free pair of cool glowing eyes. Downsides: you're dead. But hey, nobody's perfect.

item.goetyawaken.access_focus.info.description: Right-click an Ender Access Lectern to bind. Hold and right-click or cast via wand to open the bound storage network remotely. Sneak + right-click to unbind.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.56.description: You don't build an army with just one type of soldier. That's like making a sandwich with only bread. Boring and ineffective.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.55.description: Trembling Focus，Repel and slow. Good for keeping adventurers at a distance. I prefer a more personal touch—like reminding them that their ancestors are watching from my army.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.54.description: The desert plague. It's rain, hail, and swarm all at once. Climate change finally weaponized.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.53.description: Wind blades. Sounds fancy, right? It's just sharpened air. Imagine being killed by a really aggressive breeze. 'How did you die?' 'Tuesday was a bit too windy.' Not the most dignified epitaph.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.52.description: Wind blades. Fancy. They think adding 'air' makes it less evil? 'Oh no, I'm being sliced by gentle breezes!' No. Evil is evil. Pick a lane, guys.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.51.description: I have a focus collection. Bulwark focus for when I need to prevent my cloak from getting punctured, leeching focus for when I'm feeling peckish... Oh, and one that just makes a 'wololo' sound when you use it. Very important for fun.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.50.description: You see, mastering one school of dark art is like eating only golden carrots. Boring. I prefer a buffet of dark arts. Necromancy for the main course, Magic as a side dish, and a pinch of Wind for dessert. Variety keeps you... undead.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.29.description: Snow! Lovely. Nothing says 'I'm an undead overlord' like watching your skeleton minions try to build a snowman. Spoiler: they keep making snow-skeletons. It's adorable and mildly narcissistic.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.28.description: You know what happens when you log off? No, don't worry. I'll wait. I've got nothing but time. Literally.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.27.description: Enchanting? Please, that's just librarians with too much time. True necromancy? Now that's an art form. It also glows better.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.26.description: This staff? Oh, it's not just for show. It shoots, it summons, and it doubles as a backscratcher for those hard-to-reach vertebrae. Multitasking.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.25.description: Those Illagers? Amateurs. They pillage villages. I raise villages. Metaphorically. Sometimes literally, if they're built on an old cemetery.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.24.description: Those Illager guys? Please. They wear pajamas to war and think they're intimidating. I've seen scarecrows with more presence. At least the crows respect those.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.23.description: The circle formation? Oh, that's my signature move. 'The Ring of 'Oh No''. Tactical advantage, psychological warfare, and it looks fabulous. No escape, no cover, just... death from all angles. I call it 'aggressive hugging'.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.22.description: Hungry for souls? I know the feeling. It's like hunger, but existential. And it never goes away. Bon appétit!

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.21.description: Nice robe. Nice crown. Stealing my look? Flattering, but also copyright infringement. My lawyers are dead, but they're also very persistent.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.20.description: Nice threads. Wait, is that MY design? You're wearing MY look? ...I'm flattered. And slightly annoyed. But mostly flattered.

entity_model_features.config.function_ex.description:
easeinelastic(k, x, y)
Interpolates between x and y using the ease in elastic function

examples here: https://easings.net/

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.39.description: Reading a book about dark arts? Cute. It's like watching a chicken read a recipe book about itself.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.38.description: Glorious? We were so glorious that the sun itself asked us to tone it down a bit. We refused. Obviously.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.37.description: Ah, the old kingdom. Great architecture, better necromancers, and the buffet was to die for. Literally.

patchouli.touhou_little_maid.book.entrie.description: Film

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.36.description: Some days you raise an army of the dead, conquer a village, and feel like a true overlord. Other days, you wake up, find your crown is crooked, and just go back to sleep. Today is one of those days.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.35.description: You know, I could turn your bones into a xylophone. And then play a sad song on it. About you.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.34.description: Humanity? Last I checked, I'm missing a few key components. Like skin. And a heartbeat. And the ability to enjoy pumpkin pie. ...Actually, I do miss pumpkin pie.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.33.description: You know, threatening you is like trying to scare a zombie with brains. Technically possible, but ultimately pointless.

sodium.options.view_bobbing.tooltip.description: If enabled, the player's view will sway and bob when moving around. Players who experience motion sickness while playing can benefit from disabling this.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.32.description: 'Nameless One'? Creative, I know. The backstory is tragic: I had a name once, a beautiful, elegant name. But then I became so powerful, so terrifying, that merely speaking my name would cause villages to crumble. ...Or maybe I just forgot it. One of those two.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.31.description: Kneel before the Nameless One! ...Or don't. I'm not your mom. But it would be dramatically appropriate.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.30.description: The Great War? The Piglins vs. Everyone? That was before my time. Missed all the drama. By the time I showed up, everyone was already mad at everyone else.

commands.tpmaster.help.description:
Usage: `/tpmaster <operation> [<arg1> <arg2> ...]`.
`/tpmaster accept` - accept the teleport request you just received.
`/tpmaster deny` - deny the teleport request you just received.
`/tpmaster away [<distance> [<mustOnLand>]]` - randomly teleport you <distance> blocks away (disable <mustOnLand> to accept positions in water).
`/tpmaster request <target> [ ask | invite ]` - create a teleport request that you ask <target> if you can teleport where <target> is, or you invite <target> to come to where you are.
`/tpmaster spawn` - teleport to shared spawn point.
`/tpmaster sethome [<index>]` - set your current location as your home <index>.
`/tpmaster home [<index>]` - teleport to your home <index>.
`/tpmaster back` - teleport back to your last death point.
`/tpmaster remove home [<index>]` - remove your home <index>.
`/tpmaster remove back` - remove your last death point.
`/tpmaster help` - show help information.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: It seems I can't tell front from back after twisting my head off. Guess that makes it harder for you to sneak up on me, eh? (Bony chuckle)
No bones to pick, no flesh to rot. Just... dignity and duty. A clean death for a clean fighter.
His sword didn't waver once. Even at the end. I almost feel... honored. Almost. Now, his vigil is over, and he can finally rest, without the void whispering in his ear.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.enigmatic_amu.description: your understanding.<br2/>When bearing it, you feel a little stronger than you do otherwise.<br2/>It appears to be not its only useful property, however. Should your flesh get torn asunder, unable to contain soul anymore - and the amulet opens the rift to unknown space, containing all items you would've otherwise dropped on the ground within it, including the amulet itself.

on other side, consisting of a single name: "<&4><&l><playername>$(clear)".<br2/>You tried to examine its structure and how it could possibly be replicated, but so far with no success. It appears as if this thing does not belong to this world at all, forged and brought here by power that remains beyond
it - then easily falls into your hands and breaks, releasing everything the unseen space it was linked with contained.

In place of your death you would find a thing that appears to be a key connected to that rift, one you dubbed Extradimensional Vessel. Today, we say "no more". The latest culinary invention of the cosmos itself shall fulfill two purposes - satiating our hunger, and becoming a symbol of our supremacy in the war on carrot. The appropriate name we have given to this

In the everlasting battle of carrot lovers against potato enjoyers, the latter were bound to find themselves at a steady disadvantage. After all, what is a baked potato, in spite of all its deliciousness, in the face of immense nutritional value and reinvigorating effects of a mere carrot, albeit covered in some gold?

book.enigmaticaddons.entry.chaos_elytra..description: Since the Heart of Abyss is in hand, why not set your gaze on the sky?<br2/>Based on the same process as the Majestic Elytra, using more evil and powerful materials can obtain these stronger elytra. book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.golem_heart.p.description: as other ones in what it does, instead helping its bearer to focus and withstand brute force. It makes their skin as tough as steel, resisting high pressures, cutting and penetrating much better than normal flesh.<br2/>The effects of the Heart manifest themselves to their

Probably among the easiest spellstones to come by, since it could potentially be found nearly anywhere among countless abandoned dungeons and mineshafts of the Overworld. But foolish would be the one who underestimates its power.<br2/>Associated with element of the earth itself, this spellstone isn't as whimsy and exquisite
full extent when its bearer has no other armor burdening them, turning their hide into armor of its own.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.ancient_tomes.description: its vast history, which are unlikely to help you conquer it, albeit probably making it more worth conquering in the first place. It's no easy task to seek pure truth in them, but with enough examples collected you should be able to significantly expand your knowledge of all worlds, uncovering many mysteries you couldn't have solved otherwise.<br2/>You might also discover multiple clues that would lead you to legendary relics and
other objects of power you might be interested to claim, but may not know where to seek them yet.

In many corners of three greatest worlds, you can happen across these tomes. They are very ancient examples of literature, and one of the few that endure until present days, despite all ruin and erasure that befell them over centuries preceding your advent.<br2/>Piecing together what little knowledge persists among their

pages is a feat unlike any other; hopefully though, it's a lot easier with mind and power of a demigod.<br2/>Unfortunately, it doesn't so often happen that that knowledge is practically usable. More often these works contain folklore and artistic descriptions of the world and

book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.enigmatic_f.description: For unknown reason, this ancient crop has long disappeared, but its tenacious vitality has allowed them to survive in the form of seeds. Perhaps you should try tasting its fruit.<br2/>The plump fruit is filled with transparent juice, and the taste is very sticky. Do you think it should be processed first.
In various ruins, you can find these eerie and dark seeds, but it seems that ordinary farmland cannot support their growth. Perhaps you should try to explore the true potential of the land.

book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.enigmatic_f.description: Although the material looks  a little hard, the solubility of Cream is beyond imagination. Beside the fresh and delicate taste, the permanent and temporary effects are also very attractive.
The bright color and spicy taste of this food are sure to arouse your passion and make you more immersed in intense battles.

After simple processing, the crystal clear jelly like object sways like slime on the plate, and the taste becomes good. In addition, after eating, you also become transparent, which seems to be very advantageous for surprise attacks.
This sweet taste can not only quench thirst, but also greatly stimulate your self-healing ability, perhaps a powerful emergency food.

In order to give better play to the fading effect, the scroll was used as a carrier, smeared with cream and engraved with arcane text to obtain such a new scroll.
This scroll can intermittently provide color fading effects, allowing you to better conceal.

modernfix.option.mixin.perf.dynamic_dfu.description:
All versions. Modifies DFU initialization to happen the first time something needs to be upgraded. This sounds similar to LazyDFU but is distinctly implemented, as it avoids loading *any* DFU classes/data structures, while LazyDFU only disables rule optimization. Essentially, this option is a safer version of DataFixerSlayer as it will still load DFU when needed.

You should typically continue to use LazyDFU even with this option enabled, as otherwise DFU rule optimization will cause lag.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.summon_ser.description: I was in the middle of plotting evil things. This better be good.
Name them if you must, but don't get attached. They're like goldfish—replaceable, and with similarly short memory spans.
Rise and shine, my little bundles of existential dread! Your boss—that's me—has some work for you. No, not world domination. Again. Something even more tedious: helping the new boss.
Greedy, aren't we? But I like that. Just don't blame me if they have better manners than you.
Come! Come! Follow me, you who rise from the waterlogged earth! At last you have found your place, my undying servants!
You're telling me you walked all the way here, through zombies and spiders, just to ask me for that? Priorities, mate.
You want skeletons? I can do skeletons. You want zombies? Easy. You want them to do your taxes? That's where I draw the line.
You want an army? Fine. But if one of them complains about back pain or asks for a pension, they're your problem now.
You want an army? Say please. No, say it like you mean it. No, still not convincing. ...Fine, I'll do it anyway. I'm a softie.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.the_twist.pag.description: Knowledge is the power. Very literally sometimes as this book proves.<br2/>The nefarious essence of the Wither's soul does allow you to twist and corrupt physical embodiment of the knowledge vessel that you look at the pages of right now. The result doesn't affect the internal contents much - The Twist will serve much the same purpose
as The Acknowledgment, allowing you to access your knowledge of this world's greatest mysteries, just wrapped into a different cover.<br2/>The true twist comes from its less scholastic purpose,

specifically from abilities it has as weapon rather than book. Attacking with it deals heavy damage and even heavier knockback, which combined with high attack speed allows for truly devastating series of strikes.<br2/>Being infused with essence of the curse and empowered with energy of the Wither's being, this relic draws power from the Ring of the Seven Curses, allowing you to overcome effects of the Fourth Curse

if you choose it as your weapon, always dealing its full damage to monsters, just as any other creatures.<br2/>Furthermore, that essence eagerly eats into vessels and souls of higher beings, burning and tearing them apart, and higher beings just so happen to conveniently include demigods, as much as the Wither itself.

modernfix.option.mixin.perf.skip_first_d.description:
1.16 & 1.19 only. **A key optimization.**

In the middle of the 1.16 development cycle, Forge patched the game to reload datapacks twice when loading an existing world, in order to fix an issue with biome ID shifting. Unfortunately, datapack reloads often take upwards of 30 seconds and so this very severely affects world loading times.

ModernFix makes the necessary changes to avoid this reload, based on the unfinished Forge PR #8163.

This change was removed by Forge in 1.18, but then a similar patch was added *again* in 1.19 to fix mod datapacks not being loaded when creating new singleplayer worlds. Fortunately, the issue is localized to the world creation screen in 1.19, and existing worlds only require a single reload. However, this still doubles the length of the lag spike when clicking "Create New World" in 1.19, and so ModernFix again makes changes to not perform a redundant reload.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.enigmatic_ite.description: Powers of this stone are so vast and overwhelming, that they appear to have never been intended to be possessed by a demigod.<br2/>It grants you ultimate protection from most environmental threats. Most hostile beings will still target you and be able to hurt you, but their attempts to take your life shall never be successful

should the spellstone remain in your possession - you cannot be slain. No matter how close you will stand to the verge of death, nothing will ever have power to push you over.<br2/>Despite bearing name 'Heart of Creation', it also grants you among the most ultimate means

to sow destruction, raining down devastating skulls similar to those summoned by the Wither.<br2/>These will also target any entities you might happen to stare at, quickly obliterating most of whoever you might choose to unleash your wrath upon.

gui.xaero_box_full_resave.description: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.

constructionwand.description.wand.description:
The %1$s can place up to %2$s blocks at the side of a building facing you and lasts %3$s.

Hold down %5$s and scroll to change placement restriction (Horizontal, Vertical, North/South, East/West, No lock).

Open the option screen with %6$s§9+Right click§0.

§5§nUNDO§0§r
Holding down §9Sneak+§0%4$s while looking at a blocks will show you the last blocks you placed with a green border around them. §9Sneak+§0%4$s§9+Right clicking§0 any of them will undo the operation, giving you all the items back. If you used the Destruction core, it will restore the blocks.

§5§nCONTAINERS§0§r
Shulker boxes, bundles and many containers from other mods can provide building blocks for the wand.

§5§nOFFHAND PRIORITY§0§r
Having blocks in your offhand will place them instead of the block you're looking at.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.twisted_mirro.description: Among the most evident applications that Twisted Heart may have, there is this mirror.<br2/>First and foremost, you can use it to look at yourself while regretting your once made decision to bear the ring. It also serves the same purpose as Potion of Recall that goes into its crafting process, but instead of enderic energies diffused
into drinkable form, it focuses sheer power of the curse to accomplish this.<br2/>The result proves surprisingly efficient, as using this mirror takes much less time than drinking a potion, and it
doesn't get consumed in the process. The teleportation is followed by considerable cooldown before you can use the mirror again, but that is surely unimportant under normal circumstances.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.end_anchor.pa.description: within those lands is finally overcome.<br2/>Dimensional Anchor works in the manner not dissimilar to that of Respawn Anchor, but will require Ender Pearls to be recharged instead of much

However barren and desolate lands of The End are, there exist reasons why one could want to dwell there. Mostly two - to seek something, or to hide from something. Until recently there was a minor inconvenience getting in the way of such desires, but with invention of Dimensional Anchor the challenge of binding the point of your resurrection to somewhere

is not the safest of places to traverse, most so when stripped of flesh... You cannot help but wonder what terrible places await those who are mislead by the light of their beacons, and what grisly fate befalls them in there.

cheaper Glowstone. As a repayment for increased maintenance costs - it can function where Respawn Anchor cannot, and has a noticeable chance to not spend a charge upon your revival. Things such as Potion of Recall will work with it much as they do with its predecessor, and Dispenser can still be used to automate recharging.<br2/>Only one thing remains of concern. Even for higher beings, space between worlds

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.insignia.page.description: Although this little trinket will not afford you increased strength, speed or will - there is more to it than appears at first glance. It allows you to conceal your name in the eyes of other demigods, and replace it with the one of your liking. Conveniently, it does not reduce the amount of other charms you can bear beside it.<br2/>The obvious way to make use

of it would be deception, but potential here is unfortunately limited, as insignia will only affect the name others see when they observe you in person. Besides, those who possess or are connected with certain godlike powers may

still be able to recognize your true name.<br2/>Another way is to distinguish yourself. This is where opportunities are limitless, especially considering that fancy colors and styles The Architect's Inkwell is known to be capable of producing are fully applicable to the alternative name you can engrave upon your insignia.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.hunter_guideb.description: Another comprehensive guide, this one will help you learn how to hunt side-by-side with beastly companions that you might have tamed. gui.xaero_box_waypoints_clamp_depth.description:
The screen depth at which in-game waypoints stop getting smaller when you go further away from them. 
 Use this if you want to make waypoints that are far away bigger/smaller on the screen. Use the "Waypoint In-Game Scale" setting to also affect the size of waypoints when you are close to them. 
 
 For the "Auto" option, go all the way to the left. 
 The automatic option attempts to give you the best value for the default values of scale types, taking your FOV and screen height into account. 
 
 Default values in older mod versions: 
 Clamp Depth: 12 
 In-Game Scale: 2.5 
 Name Text Scale: 0.5 
 Distance Text Scale: 0.8

gui.xaero_wm_box_detect_ambiguous_y.description: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!

config.entity_texture_features.emissive_.description:
This sets whether emissives use 'Brighter' or 'Default' rendering
This is hard to describe, just try it out in-game :)
Bright rendering makes the emissive appear at max brightness if need be
and is only partially compatible with shaders, etc.
Default rendering respects the default renderers effects on entities,
the direction of each surface will have slight brightness variation
and the emissives will be a bit less bright overall
as well as usually smaller bloom with shaders.

book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.enchantment.description: Of course, whether it is a good or bad enchantment, it will try to replicate it together. The power of this Astral Tree is still too pure.

Similarly, Tome of Hungering Knowledge is still making people want to constantly make and try to craft.<br2/>This time, it brings magic from the Astral Tree, which allows it to perfectly replicate the enchantments stored in the item without changing any of them.

tooltip.goety_revelation.tip18.ability.description: §4§o§lWhen you die, you will be instantly healed to 50% of your health, be invincible for 30 seconds, while summoning Wither Servant at the same time, and the weather will be locked to thunderstorm with Nether Meteors raining down.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.etherium_armo.description: body, the armor itself becomes completely invisible and feels much less of a burden to carry than armor forged from mundane metals. Until something attempts to interact with you or that armor, it's actually possible to entirely forget you even carry it, that's how unnoticeable is its weight for one who bears it.

Surely, it didn't take you too long to guess that newfound power of etherium might come in handy in an attempt of forging the ultimate armor. Etherium armor might not be truly ultimate, yet by far it surpasses anything you can create or lay claim upon.<br2/>One of its first notable properties is that should you equip it and bear on your

similarity of that shield to one Wither conjures when brought down to half of its health. That must imply some relation to origin and nature of etherium's power, but you don't seem to have enough clues to put pieces of this story together just yet.<br2/>Following pages contain depictions of how etherium armor can be forged, according to your design.

It only activates when its bearer somehow manages to get severely wounded, despite outstanding protection of the armor itself. When they remain at their full health and thus can manage to deal with incoming threats without additional measures of protection, the shield is dispelled and etherium slowly replenishes its inner energy, until the need to manifest it arises again.<br2/>It's difficult to not notice the

Should you carry all four pieces simultaneously, and that resonation achieves its peak, finally being able to manifest itself into powerful shield woven out of sheer energy, protecting its bearer from most projectiles, significantly weakening attacks that it isn't capable of blocking completely, and knocking back whoever attempts to execute these attacks.<br2/>That shield, however, takes a lot of energy to sustain.

That ease, however, doesn't mean it's worse at absorbing enemy attacks. It supersedes even netherite armor it how extremely hard it is to penetrate. More than that, it also is unimaginably durable - even the most crushing blows barely leave a scratch on its surface.<br2/>And as if that wasn't enough, individual armor pieces seem to resonate with one another, urging to unleash the metal's inner energy.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.cosmic_cake.p.description: Who can withstand in the face of such deliciousness, who can resist the desire to exchange power, influence, riches and even life itself for becoming submerged in ceaseless, infinite act of consumption? Those things are temporary after all... but the cake, the cake is eternal.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.cosmic_cake.p.description: There is only one issue in the mundane cake, one final flaw that prevents it from becoming perfect - it always ends, as imminently as life of a mortal man. At last, you conceived a way to rectify this annoying imperfection, letting you enjoy its creamy grace forevermore.<br2/>Imbued with primordial power, incorporating alien delicacy and spiced up with elemental

energies, this cake defies the flow of time, reversing entropy itself to restore its glorious, palatable form. However much you submit yourself to the sin of gluttony, it will always recover from any devouring assault of yours.

book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.harmonious_.description: Although many people are aware of the powerful combined effect of the Unholy Grail and the Forbidden Fruit, there are still many who are unwilling to sacrifice countless delicacies for this fleeting pleasure. Under the collision of these two ideas, this recipe was developed.<br2/>Putting the forbidden fruit into the grail and watching the
liquid gradually take on a different color, you feel like it's time to taste it.<br2/>Taking a sip of thick liquid and pairing it with sliced fruit pieces at the edge of the grail, the delicate taste
is unforgettable. If you have ever tasted Celestial Fruit, you will surely be able to sense a similar flavor.

book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.curse_blade.description: Finally, by using the potion of Recall to rescue all souls trapped in the Cursed Soul Crystal, we can truly escape from the suffering caused by the Seven Curses.
After all of this, there may still be some soul fragments left in your hands. Why not use them to forge some unique items.
Set your gaze on a strange charm - Hell Blade Charm.<br2/>As items with curses and sharp double-edged edges, we may as well shatter them and use the two edges to complete this action.

Place your fingers on the cutting board, and with a crisp sound, the Ring of Seven Curses is released. Accompanied by intense pain, a slightly damaged knife and a Cursed Soul Crystal.<br2/>But for now, you could be a bit happier about getting rid of the seven curses.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.advanced_brew.description: They can also be brewed from and converted into both splash and lingering versions, via conventional means.
If a potion has instant effect, it will just receive one additional level of effect. Thus Potion of Healing will apply Instant Health III if brewed into ultimate version.
If a potion has only extended version, typically it will have doubled duration of extended version. As seen here, ultimate Invisibility potion applies its effect for 16 minutes.
If potion has both extended and empowered version, its ultimate version will combine best from both. In case with Strength, this means that its ultimate potion will apply Strength II for 8 minutes.

inventoryprofiles.config.description.num.description: How many notification you will get before the switch

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.advanced_brew.description: Ultimate potions can be brewed from both extended and, if chosen potion has such variation, empowered version.<br2/>Result will not vary from this.

One of immediate ways Astral Dust may come in handy is in potion brewing. Its unusual properties allow to achieve what was previously thought of as impossible, creating ultimate potions that combine both powerful effect and extended duration.<br2/>Following pages contain examples of effects you may achieve by doing so.

modernui.center.text.computeDeviceFontSi.description:
When rendering in 2D, this option allows Modern UI to exactly compute font size in device-space from the current coordinate transform matrix.
This provides perfect text rendering for scaling-down texts in vanilla, but may increase GPU memory usage.
When disabled, Modern UI will use SDF text rendering if appropriate.
This option only applies to outline fonts.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.forbidden_axe.description: Those wither skeletons are often quite frustrating to deal with. The only significant reason for you to be interested in their pitiful existence is their skulls, which happen to be much more precious and useful in arcane arts than skeletons themselves.<br2/>But they won't willingly hand their skulls to you, no matter how nicely you ask.

at all, even if you couldn't ever before.<br2/>Urge for blood that this weapon has within may come in handy even apart from its special beheading ability, as it can deliver faster and more devastating blows than even netherite blade.

And despite a lot of practice you have had, it remains quite difficult for you to separate fragile skull from the useless rest of their body, without accidentally crushing it - they just won't calmly stand in place for you to deliver

one precise swing of your blade, as if intentionally trying to irritate you.<br2/>This axe is forged specifically to help you with this uneasy work. Fused with finest metal of the Nether and infused with its dark and twisted nature, it urges to tear through your foes' necks, flinging their heads into the air.<br2/>Besides skeletons, it proves to be able to behead almost any creature that can be beheaded

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.molten_heart_.description: This one serves as an improved version of Fire Resistance potion, should you find yourself willing to invest less common ingredients in order to obtain greater effect.<br2/>Besides granting you complete immunity to fire and lava, it extinguishes you when you are on fire, and improves your sense of surroundings in molten magmatic currents to noticeable extent.
Ultimately, it should make the experience of stewing in lava oceans of the Nether considerably more enjoyable.
Its effect can be extended using redstone dust.
You can also brew it into splash...
...or lingering types, just like you can any other regular potion.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.magnet_ring.p.description: Despite simplicity of its design, Magnetic Ring already holds some arcane power.<br2/>Perhaps not the one that defies creation itself, yet still quite useful - whatever thing might be lying on the ground around you, this ring will bring it towards you, sparing you the labor of walking to it and picking it  up yourself.
One of its notable properties is that items you might attempt to throw away will refuse to leave you, instantly attempting to re-enter your inventory, unless you willingly suppress the ring's power.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.etherium_swor.description: Despite its massive appearance, this tool is actually a slightly easier to handle than normal, smaller swords. Only for you, of course - your foes will not find it nearly as easy to bear strikes of such weapon as it would be for you to deliver them.<br2/>Etherium Broadsword lies in the perfect middle between

other two etherium weapons. Not as light and agile as scythe, not as massive and crushing as waraxe, yet it takes best from both, allowing you to deliver confident strikes with reasonable downtime, ones that will be

considerably hurtful even to the most protected foe.<br2/>Unlike that of other tools, the broadsword's ability is exclusively combat-related. At your command it will throw you back from where you're facing, covering considerable distance. This can be used as a way to quickly retreat between series of strikes or when needing to quickly dodge especially deadly attacks. Short cooldown does allow this ability to be useful even in
tightest combat scenarios, if you have  enough skill to use it properly.<br2/>Just as other etherium tools, broadsword does possess impressive durability, far superseding that of any earthly weapons.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.ichor_bottle..description: Where exactly this so called "blood of gods" comes from is a question yet unanswered, and perhaps better left as such. Now that you have some at your disposal, however, you can consume it to increase your body's ability to channel arcane energies, allowing you to equip one more of those precious charms that magnify your abilities in one way or another.

The relic of such rarity is almost impossible to find, and you cannot help but wonder how it happened that one ended up in your hands. Perhaps, you were drawn together by your divine nature, or perhaps some greater power directed you towards it?..

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.extradimensio.description: You often come across creatures you wouldn't mind to take back home with you, for either closer research on them, or to keep them around as pets, or as livestock.<br2/>But even the most docile animals prove to be extremely difficult to deliver over vast distances - even when they willingly follow you, they are slow, almost completely

incapable of finding their way around obstacles, and will most certainly get lost if you don't pay attention.<br2/>But having one of these eyes at your disposal can render the task of getting almost any

creature where you want it to be to action as simple as unleashing the eye's power. You will first require to bind the eye to location that will be the destination. You can then walk up to any creature and use the power of the eye on it to make it vanish into thin air, appearing at the destination point.<br2/>Unfortunately, the eye itself also vanishes in process, and unlike the creature you are transporting - never makes it
to the final destination. You are still uncertain on where exactly it goes, as once it vanishes there is no trace of it ever being present in a physical reality at all.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.guardian_hear.description: and have repeatedly cursed you with almost completely disability to break blocks, thus effectively preventing you from breaking your way into the walls of the monument and carving your own path among them.<br2/>This heart appears to be the source of their senses and power that allowed to cast such curse on you. It resonates with the twisted energies of Ring of the Seven Curses, which was why you

This relic seems to be a living heart, teared from the body of one of the Elder Guardians, which in turn seem to be particularly ancient and powerful variation of guardian species. They could sense you approaching their home long before you even submerged yourself under the ocean's surface where it was located,

Ocean Monuments, along with countless Guardians that patrol them within and outside, stand among the greatest mysteries of this world.
And themselves Guardians present a lot more immediate interest than submerged halls and corridors, filled with nothing but water and darkness apart from those protecting this abandoned domain.

empowered to aid in such betrayal. Monsters surrounding enraged one will also be affected by the curse, forced to forget what they were doing and turn against the one it befell.<br2/>It should be noted that primary target of the curse will return to regular state of mind after having killed whoever it was forced to attack. Same goes for monsters that turn against cursed one - if they succeed in slaying it,

conjure a curse which will befall that monster. Normally it doesn't seem capable of producing powerful curses, as even Elder Guardians themselves couldn't do much more with its power to you than just slow you down. But sheer power of the Seven Curses infuses heart with much greater ability, so instead of mild debuff the mind of affected monster will be manipulated and forced to turn against one of its kind, while body will be temporarily

who possess such hearts, especially granted that it's now empowered by Seven Curses that you bear. This assumption however raises many unanswered questions about origins of those hearts, as well as origin of Guardians themselves.<br2/>Another heart's ability is that when you carry it around on your hotbar or hold in your hand, turning your sight upon the monster close enough to you will cause the heart to

were able to obtain it alive and intact.<br2/>With Heart of the Guardian at your disposal, regular Guardians are not only rendered neutral towards you, but also prioritize dispatching potential threats close enough to you, monsters and alike. Reason of such respect remains a mystery, but perhaps the power of the heart has much greater connection to them and influence on their minds than Elder Guardians
as you can between yourself and them while they are busy resolving inner conflict in their group.

they will return to their normal monster activities, with those activities likely being trying to kill you. Active ability of the heart will not work at all if monster you choose to turn your sight upon doesn't have any other monsters it could see within close proximity.<br2/>This ability has considerable cooldown, so don't expect it alone will save you from crowd of Zombie Piglins chasing you - better put as much distance.

config.entity_texture_features.property_.description:
Variant 
ETF Only!
Select which variant a mob must be
This property will work with any vanilla or modded entity that implements the VariantHolder class and
will use the string representation of the type, e.g. "black" for a cat, "oak" for a boat.
This property also works uniquely with these block entities:
- signs (wood)
- bed (color)
- shulkerbox (color)
- Decorated pot (all 4 sherd face types)
- skulls(appending facing direction at the end)
For all other regular & block entities it returns the EntityType or BlockEntityType registry id.
This allows for the separation of different entity types that might use the same model or texture.
Can prefix with "print:" to always print the variant the mob appears as to the log
Example: variant.1=black yellow
§avariant.<n>=<list>

config.entity_texture_features.property_.description:
Blocks
sets the texture for the entity based on the block it is on
this also checks the block it is inside allowing things like water, cave_air, flowers, etc. to be used
Blocks added by mods can also be used but require "modID:blockName", whereas vanilla blocks can be either "minecraft:stone" or just "stone".
as of v4.4 this property also allows comparing additional block properties as per the OptiFine spec here https://optifine.readthedocs.io/syntax.html#blocks-and-items
§ablocks.<n>=<block_list>

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.ender_ring.pa.description: the need to carry around that massive chest, chucking it down whenever you want to pull something out of its extradimensional depths, and then removing it with incredibly delicate tool, unless you want it to be

Ender Chest has proven to be extremely useful thing, allowing you to access items of your choice across any distances and dimensions. Unlike items you may carry on yourself, those in your ender chest are not endangered when your physical shell gets destroyed.<br2/>There is a slight inconvenience to it, however -

book.enigmaticaddons.entry.totem_of_mali.description: As their wish for revenge has been fulfilled, they will not forget their duty. They are still willing to protect you in the most dangerous moments and release themselves to attack the enemies around.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.ender_ring.pa.description: shattered into obsidian pieces you once so carefully fused together.<br2/>Ring of Ender is designed exactly to solve this issue, allowing you to tear the fabric of space and access contents of your ender chest with nothing but sheer force of will.<br2/>Just don't forget to pull your hand out of when you release the rift.

book.enigmaticaddons.entry.totem_of_mali.description: We have no idea about how the illagers created totems of undying, but behind each totem there must be sacrifices of living beings.<br2/>But now, using the nefarious essence to release the malice of these sealed souls, mobilizing their anger towards illagers, to fulfill their final desire for revenge.

Strict: Indicates breaking text with the most stringent line-breaking rules.

some kind of magical curse.

Now that I have encountered a protection spell on the ruined labyrinth here, I consider my suspicions confirmed. Both the protection spell and the mosquitoes are a

block.tetra.hammer_base.guide.description:
To upgrade a Tetra hammer into a §8Dark Ingot Forge Hammer§r:
1.Requirements
  - Off-hand: Hold the seven upgrade materials in order(top-to-bottom as shown in JEI's right panel).

  - Main hand: Hold a Tetra hammer of Cany tier.

2.Crafting Process

  - Right-click the Hammer block with the setup above.

  - Success indicator:

    - A sound effect plays , and one material is consumed from your off-hand.

    - Repeat until all seven materials are forged into the hammer.

3.Completion

  - When fully upgraded, the hammer will emit continuous particle effects, confirming the creation of the Dark Ingot Hammer.

config.structure_layout_optimizer.dedupl.description:
Whether to use an alternative strategy to make structure layouts generate slightly even faster than the default optimization this mod has for template pool weights. This alternative strategy works by changing the list of pieces that structures collect from the template pool to not have duplicate entries.
This will not break the structure generation, but it will make the structure layout different than if this config was off (breaking vanilla seed parity). The cost of speed may be worth it in large modpacks where many structure mods are using very high weight values in their template pools.

Pros: Get a bit more performance from high weight Template Pool Structures.
Cons: Loses parity with vanilla seeds on the layout of the structure. (Structure layout is not broken, just different)

modernfix.option.mixin.perf.reduce_block.description:
All versions. **A key optimization.** Newer Minecraft versions (after 1.12) implemented a blockstate cache system that caches frequently used information about a blockstate, such as whether it is solid, its collision shape, etc. Rebuilding this cache is quite fast in vanilla (it takes only a second or two) but is quite slow with many mods installed, as there are many more blockstates present in the game which all must have their caches rebuilt.

This problem is exacerbated by Forge as the cache is rebuilt at many points when the data would almost certainly be unused before the next rebuild. Examples include right before reaching the main menu (during the "Freezing data" stage), as well as multiple (!) times when a world is being loaded.

ModernFix solves this performance bottleneck by instead making cache rebuilds lazy. Each blockstate rebuilds its cache the first time the data would be accessed. At any point when vanilla or Forge would attempt to rebuild caches for all blockstates, this is redirected to simply invalidate the cache on each blockstate instead.

This should not have any impact on TPS after startup concludes.

modernfix.option.mixin.perf.resourcepack.description:
All versions. **A key optimization.** Launches on modern versions are heavily bottlenecked by filesystem access. Many requests are frequently made to resource packs to list resources or check if a given resource exists, and each of these result in a very slow file API call.

ModernFix completely eliminates most of the bottleneck here by simply caching a listing of all resources that exist within mod-provided and vanilla resourcepacks. The cache is rebuilt on resource reload (except for the vanilla resources, since they should never change while the game is running).

There are no known compatibility issues with this patch except for OptiFine (its CTM resources do not load correctly). However I do not recommend using OptiFine in any scenario, as it adds several minutes to launch time by itself and is not tested with ModernFix at all.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.19.description: Did I miss anything interesting? New liches rising? New dimensions discovered? ...Another ancient evil awakening? No? Just another ordinary day, then.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.18.description: Ah, the sweet scent of resurrection. Smells like... dust, old bones, and someone's impending regret.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.17.description: Another day, another chance to remind mortals why they fear the dark. And why they should really invest in better torches.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.16.description: You know, death is restful. Then someone always wants to start a kingdom again. Fine, but I'm keeping the throne.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.15.description: Being summoned feels like waking up from a nap you never asked for.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.14.description: Back from the dead. Again. At this point, it's just a commute.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.13.description: The Nameless One returns. Still nameless, but slightly more fabulous.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.12.description: Ah, back from the void. Did someone miss me? ...No? Rude.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.11.description: I see you've mastered the art of necromancy. Good for you. Now, point me at something that needs a permanent attitude adjustment.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.10.description: Being summoned feels like waking up after a thousand-year nap with a crick in every single bone. Which, admittedly, is a lot of bones.

entity_model_features.config.variable_ex.description: The entity's current movement in the direction 90 degrees to the right of their facing direction. Ranges from -1 to 1 denoting the X axis intercept of a unit circle of the players current movement vector.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.26.description: Welcome. I am known as the Nameless One. I have awaited your rise, just as was prophesied long ago. I have waited patiently for countless lifetimes, but it has all been worth it. You have finally arrived.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.25.description: Nice base you got here. Needs more skulls. Just saying.

config.jade.item_mod_name_desc.description: Show which mod is an item from on its tooltip.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.24.description: Ah, a fresh summoning. Please tell me you have foes. Or souls. Either works.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.23.description: Behold! I rise... slowly... these bones aren't as young as they used to be. Give a lich a minute, will you?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.22.description: Behold! The Nameless One arises! ...Again. This is getting to be a habit. A fun habit, but still.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.21.description: Ah... another nap interrupted. You better have souls Or enemies. Preferably both.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.20.description: Death is not the end. It's just a really, really long loading screen. And I've finally spawned back in.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.desolation_ri.description: You can scarce comprehend presence imposed upon reality by Heart of the Abyss, but, as you have recently discovered, comprehension is not necessary for the ability to make use of it. Among few equally wonderful and terrible things that can draw power from it, there is this ring - even more nightmarish, perhaps, than Ring of the Seven Curses, in its
unnameable nature.<br2/>It offers to conveniently fulfill your gnawing desire to set yourself free of necessity to endlessly slaughter creatures that could once tolerate your presence,

but have lost such ability soon as you submitted yourself to the burden of Seven Curses... By erasing them from the very existence surrounding you.<br2/>The cost of such reality-bending power is perilous, however, as should you decide that you desire it - you will be bound to it forevermore. And as you know by now, void can be more unbearable than even most frightening, ever-present threat...

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.soul_loss.pag.description: Hopefully, even under the worst circumstances, you won't lose all your life force. As fabric of your soul thins out, it becomes more and more resistant to being torn apart one more time.<br2/>It is safe to assume that at some point you will not be able to lose any more of your soul fragments, no matter how many times you die - though you would be left in an incredibly vulnerable state to any physical threat by then.

the demigod can only be destroyed by something of a higher nature. Not even other demigods can hope to claim or destroy your crystals.<br2/>With every fragment of your soul lost, you vitality fades, you become weaker and easier to kill. But should you approach your Soul Crystal, and it will lean towards you, and lost fragment of your soul will be instantly freed from its crystal prison, fusing together with your being again.

reality, in form known as the Soul Crystal. Luckily for you, being a part of this reality actually makes it less vulnerable than otherwise.<br2/>Soul Crystals would float in the air, invulnerable and not reacting to any force acting upon them, as though being only a part of it, soul of

Every death comes with its own tolls, but there is one far more significant than all others you had to face before.<br2/>It does appear that every time you die in this world, a part of your very soul is separated from you, remaining in the place of your demise. It doesn't stay ethereal for too long, instead quickly manifesting itself into physical

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.cursed_ring.p.description: instance, but doing so will not allow you to skip the night along with all threats that lurk in its darkness.<br2/>On the other hand, in exchange for this toll paid, you will surely receive some profits. These are so called <&l>"Seven Blessings"$(clear), which promise to reward anyone who chooses to bear the ring with equal benefits in exchange for all the suffering they are about to put themselves through. Don't let yourself be fooled,

demise, and once you approach them, they will fuse back with your soul, restoring your lost health back.<br2/><&l>The Seventh Curse$(clear) will cause you to lose your sleep in the night, rendering you unable to let it go past you any quicker than it usually does by just giving yourself in to less cruel and disturbing world of dreams. You can still lay in bed like normal, and use it to set place considered your home for

however; while power some of those blessings provide is surely tempting to possess, it won't make up for even 1/10th of all tolls you will have to pay for it, and it might be too late to reconsider once you discover that through practice rather than bare theory. <br2/>Exact list of those blessings is probably known to you already, so it's not worth outlining it here. The only thing probably worth mentioning is that they act

even? If distance that separates you from them is short enough, their senses will give you out to them even if they can't directly see you at the moment.<br2/><&l>The Third Curse$(clear) causes any armor you bear to be significantly less effective against any damage it is supposed to absorb, being about 30 percents less tough and resistant.<br2/><&l>The Fourth Curse$(clear) diminishes

by causing you to experience twice the harm and twice the pain from anything that hurts you. Scars will turn into wounds, and wounds will turn into severe, if not instantly lethal, trauma.<br2/><&l>The Second Curse$(clear) causes most creatures that are normally indifferent towards you, unless provoked, to always act as if you are the greatest threat around. Perhaps, they aren't quite unright in this assumption

You can still save yourself from it by extinguishing that fire with water, for instance, which will be a very helpful solution until you consider taking a journey to The Nether.<br2/><&l>The Sixth Curse$(clear) tears a fragment of your soul from you on every death, causing you to have progressively less health with every such fragment lost. Those fragments are hopefully not lost forever - they will remain in place of your

your strength against anything that is considered a monster-like being, which means almost against anything that will be willing to hurt you in this world.<br2/><&l>The Fifth Curse$(clear) allows you to experience what perpetually burning in hellfire would feel like. Should you be set on fire, that fire will never go out on itself, incinerating your flesh and boiling your blood until there's nothing more to incinerate and boil.

Seven unforgiving curses will befall whoever is brave enough to embrace this darkness. Granted the commitment that wearing this ring casts upon such unlucky soul, it would be worth listing exactly what they are:<br2/><&l>The First Curse$(clear) will make your suffering unbearable,

Another item that you unexpectedly located in your pockets, this ring however is seething with malevolent darkness, nothing like splendor and mystery of Enigmatic Amulet. Once you decide to wear it, it shall fuse with your very soul, intertwining your fates, and there's little hope to ever separate you again...
Even in death.

The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions.

telemetry.event.world_loaded.description.description:
Knowing how players play Minecraft (such as Game Mode, client or server modded, and game version) allows us to focus game updates to improve the areas that players care about most.
The World Loaded event is paired with the World Unloaded event to calculate how long the play session has lasted.
