book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.etherium_axe..description: instead. Aside from logs or planks, it also effectively deals with less sturdy plantlife, like leaves or cacti or bamboo.<br2/>As a weapon, it deals massive damage and, being an axe,

deals more effectively with enemy's shield if they have one. The only downside is that it is incredibly heavy, and while that allows you to cause greater damage with every attack, you will also need to take longer break before each swing to recover from previous one and once again be able to attack at full power.<br2/>As any other etherium tool, Etherium Waraxe is also extremely durable.

Unlike normal axes, this massive beast is designed to serve as tool and weapon at the same time, excelling as both.<br2/>When using it as tool, it can chop down wood in massive space of 3x3x3 blocks, centered around the point of impact. You can suppress this ability if you totally require to deal with individual blocks

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Respawn's a heck of a drug, isn't it? Don't worry, I won't tell anyone how you died.
Interesting strategy, dying right there. Really adds character to the landscape. Though I preferred the spot you died in yesterday, better lighting.
Respawning? How many times must I teach you this lesson, old man?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Remember, kids: death is temporary, but the embarrassment is eternal.

setting.world_map.new_chunks_save_load_t.description: Saves and loads NewChunk data to disk for each world and dimension. Requires NewChunk Highlighting to be enabled.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Tell death I said hi. We're on a first-name basis.
Respawning? Sure, take your time. I'll be here, judging your life choices.
It's a beautiful day outside. Birds are singing, flowers are blooming. On days these, it's a shame you dark mage's not burning in hell.
Your respawn timer is shorter than my attention span. See you in 5... 4...
Task failed successfully? No, wait, that's not how it works. Better luck next respawn!
Wasted.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Your demise has been added to the textbook: 'How to End a Mage's Life in the Most Embarrassing Way Possible'.
Achievement unlocked: 'Philanthropist' – Donated your soul to the local necromancer.
There are many ways to die. Falling from a high place? Too generic. Should be 'They tried to prove they're better at not dying than the Nameless One, and failed.'
'You have died. Continue?'... Here, the answer is: 'Sure, as a skeleton.'
Care to leave a 5-star review on the death screen?
This is why I don't play on Hardcore mode.
Server lag? No, you lag.
Achievement unlocked: Die Like a Nobody. Oh wait, you already are one.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Well done. Here come the test results: 'You are a horrible person.' That's what it says: a horrible person. We weren't even testing for that.

advancements.goety.servant_kill_apostle..description: Have a Servant defeat an Apostle.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Ooooh, that looked like it hurt! ...Wait, it did? Oh. My bad. ...Not sorry.

advancements.end.find_end_city.title.description: The City at the End of the Game

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: 'You Died.' Fancy font. Very dramatic. Almost makes up for the lack of skill.
Game over, man! GAME OVER!
Skill issue.
That's one small step for a man, one giant pile of dead for mankind.
I used to be an adventurer like you. Then I took a... well, you know the rest.
Please stay determined! Or not lol.
Hey, on the bright side: no hospital bills in Minecraft. Just walk it off.

modmenu.descriptionTranslation.nochatrep.description: Strips cryptographic signatures from player messages, making it impossible to track and associate them with your Mojang/Microsoft account, as well as to use the Player Chat Reporting feature.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: Respawn, retry, rage quit. The holy trinity of your gameplay.

modernfix.option.mixin.bugfix.extra_expe.description: Fixes the experimental feature warning being shown still being shown the first time you reopen a world that was created as experimental.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.player_dea.description: GG. EZ. — Oh sorry, reflex. Even undead can't resist the taunt, occupational hazard.
From hero to zero. Told you that quote would be useful someday.
Don't worry, I know a great resurrection spell. ...Oh wait, that's YOUR job.
Dark souls... please take this... oh it's you. Regular customer, just find a spot to lie down.
So, where's your new spawn point? Bed didn't explode, I hope? Good. I'll have my skeletons burn some paper offerings... wait, no paper here. How about some planks?
One moment you're commanding legions, the next you're commanding... dirt. The circle of life. Or undeath. Whatever.
In my millennia of career, I've learned one truth: the living always think they can win. They're wrong.
Well, well, well. If it isn't the consequence of your own actions. I'd say 'I told you so', but my non-existent lips are sealed.
Death is not the end, only being forgotten is. But honestly, I'll probably forget you in about five minutes. So... you know.
Need me to summon some skeletons for a funeral procession? I can make them dance too. Gotta set the mood right.

config.entity_texture_features.property_.description:
Height ranges
Replaces legacy minHeight and maxHeight properties.
Since 1.18 negative values may be specified for height. When used in a range they can be put in brackets for Optifine but will function as written for ETF.
ETF supports:             1 2-4   -65-2  -65--2   1-4   (-65)-2  (-65)-(-2)
Optifine supports only:   1 2-4                   1-4   (-65)-2  (-65)-(-2)
§aheights.<n>=<height_ranges>

Height legacy
ETF also supports the legacy minHeight and maxHeight properties.
they can be a single number from -64 to 319
§aminHeight.<n>=<height>
§amaxHeight.<n>=<height>

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.blazing_core..description: Blazing Core grants you anything you may need to survive the extreme heat of the underworld. Fire and lava will be rendered completely harmless to you, although temporarily; and, to an extent, flames will protect you from those who tries to attack you... Well, maybe not protect, but at least help to deliver your instant vengeance.

Among the blazing wastes and seething oceans of lava stretching over blasted reaches of the Nether, among the cries of souls torn apart and forgotten, and ashes that any attempt to lay claim and rule over these wastes were reduced to, there's no surprise to come across the spellstone that embodies element of the fire itself.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.1.description: I haven't eaten in centuries. Not because I'm dead, but because the local cuisine is terrible. Too much sand.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.2.description: You call that armor? My skeletons dress better than you, and they've been wearing the same outfit for 500 years.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.3.description: Life's a joke, and I've been dead long enough to appreciate the punchline.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.4.description: Life is like a skeleton's joke: no body gets it.

constructionwand.description.core_destru.description: The destruction core destroys blocks (no tile entities) on the side facing you. Maximum number of blocks depends on wand tier. Destroyed blocks disappear into the void, you can use the undo feature if you've made a mistake.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.6.description: Dishonorable? Dude, I've been dead for millennia. Social conventions are for people with pulse.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.7.description: Read that scroll, are you? Smart move. I spent centuries learning to turn skeletons into necromancers the hard way. You get to skip straight to the good part. Life's not fair, and neither is undeath.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.8.description: Burial Scroll? Found one in my own pyramid once. Very embarrassing. Imagine someone reading your diary, except the diary turns skeletons into necromancers.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.chat.9.description: Souls. Delicious, nutritious, and they never go out of style. It's like farming, but the crops scream. Adds flavor.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.twisted_heart.description: into the world around you - they just require a little assistance from you.<br2/>As soon as you laid claim upon Heart of the Earth, you have noticed that it resonates with dark power of the ring, setting pulsations of pure energy within it slightly out of tact. This influence is hopefully not strong enough to instantly tarnish the heart, therefore rendering it unusable for regular crafting. But with small amount of carefully selected

arcane ingredients and a fraction of your demigod power involved, you can reinforce the link between the heart's core and curses that you bear, allowing latter to corrupt it and transform into something entirely different.<br2/>Twisted Heart is a product of this unholy ritual, an artifact incarnating part of the great curse, darker and more powerful than what Heart of the Earth used to contain.
It cannot be used for purposes Heart of the Earth was useful for, but it surely will have its own applications.

...and thus, it was you who have chosen this fate. You have surely acknowledged what sorrow and regret this choice will cost you many times in the long journey ahead, but you still have done it. Do you even know why?<br2/>Regardless, there is no way back - only ahead, in an attempt to harness the power of great curses you are now

bound with. This task is hopefully not as complicated as it might seem if you can gain access to required ingredients, as curses themselves seem to actively seek new ways to spread tendrils of their corruption

book.enigmaticaddons.entry.pure_heart.pa.description: With different materials, you may be able to try a production different from Twisted Heart. The combination of hidden dark pollution and faint divinity gave birth to this eerie creation with bright appearance.<br2/>Unlike another type of item, the Pure Heart and its creations typically provide protection and assistance,

rather than aggressive power.<br2/>But although it is a divine creation, it needs to rely on the power of curses, which is too ironic. So when using these items, please also pay attention to the hidden dangers.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.mega_sponge.p.description: in your backyard.<br2/>It is highly recommended that you avoid throwing this thing out into the ocean, for reasons that are likely clearly understandable.

water they can absorb, implied by physical space those exist in. Dumping all absorbed liquid into space beyond our own, it can keep absorbing water indefinitely. Now you can easily drain something much bigger than humble water pond

Even common sponges are capable of absorbing impressive amounts of water, being a convenient tool that can help in clearing small water pools or interior of structures submerged underwater. But it can always get better.<br2/>Extrapolated Megasponge cures the only downside that sponges have - limits on how much

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.monster_charm.description: you are pretty sure you shall never have to suffer such fate. How could you possibly have anything in common?..

quote.end_doorstep_1.description: The doorstep of The End... single step now separates you from it.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.monster_charm.description: Sometimes those monsters mindlessly wandering in the dark can become great annoyance. Now that you hold power to forge Netherite, more often than not they're reduced from once considerable threat to a slight inconvenience staining your blade. However, at times it still takes a couple strikes to make sure their souls ceased to cling to flesh, and doing so isn't
incredibly rewarding on its own anymore.<br2/>Emblem of Monster Slayer is a perfect charm to aid you in these frequent encounters, saving you a hit or two of your sword.

Creatures slain when bearing it will leave behind more useful stuff you can collect. Should those creatures happen to be monsters, you will also be able to absorb greater part of their life force, in form of experience.<br2/>A couple times you've happened across stories of heroes, who have dedicated their life for once to fighting monsters, yet ended up becoming monsters on their own. Just by looking at the common zombie, however,

book.enigmaticlegacy.category.materials..description: You are perfectly familiar with most mundane materials and resources, which this world holds plenty of. But should you dig a little further - and you might discover things even you have never beheld before.<br2/>As you keep seeking new materials to forge better tools and armor from, it would be worth to denote unusual properties of some of them.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.abyssal_heart.description: more unsettling than anything a man's imagination can come up with.<br2/>Regardless, now you are the rightful owner of this thing. And it will not be long before you can put it to some unimaginably violent, frightening use... The world will suffer tenfold for all the suffering it caused to you.

When this unearthly abomination fell into your hands for the first time, description-defying mix of feelings have overcome your mind, among which there was a place for terror and excitement, admiration and disgust. The gaze of its lonely eye befell you with intent impossible to comprehend, but once initial wave of emotions retreated - you have

concluded that it poses no threat to you.<br2/>Still, you know not what it truly is, and where it came from. Perhaps your insufferable existence, and efforts to live in spite of Seven Curses were noticed by some unnameable eldritch power, and through your

damnable being it have chosen to channel itself into the world. Perhaps it is a mere accident, a fluke in reality itself that allowed something like this to appear. Perhaps it is your ailing mind that have conceived this horror in some nightmarish fever, and with its growth - corruption of the curses have managed to manifest it into the mortal realm?<br2/>Perhaps it's best to never know, for some truths are much

book.enigmaticaddons.entry.bless_stone.p.description: After the final soul loss, the Ring of Seven Curses will completely disappear from your sight and turn into a touch of gold on your hand.<br2/>The previous curses has completely disappeared, also the original blessing has been partially preserved. Although most of the objects that once

accompanied you are no longer usable, there are still some things that bear witness to your past filled with suffering, which is constantly approaching death. They still recognize your qualifications, are willing to break the shackles of the curse for you. <br2/>May you enjoy life to the fullest on days away from the curses. But you cannot truly understand this ring, please do not make the choice easily.

When you are hesitating whether to sacrifice yourself to break free from the Seven Curse Ring, there is a brand new choice in front of you.<br2/>The biggest problem is the Loss of Soul, and with the current materials and methods, it seems impossible. Although we can't break the connection, we could let the connection be presented in a new way.

Slowly infiltrate a little pure power into the Ring of Seven Curses, and mobilize the blessings to change the curses. However, all these operations still need to be carried out when the contact is vulnerable, that is, you need to face death.

gui.nochatreports.encryption_warning.con.description:
You can encrypt your messages using a secret key. Only people who know this key will be able to decrypt them. No Chat Reports will automatically decrypt all encrypted messages when a suitable key is provided and the feature is enabled.
However, be aware that encryption is not a "magic wand" kind of solution. Moderators on third-party servers can mute or ban you for sending what will appear to them as a garbled mess in chat. Futhermore, it is recommended that you generate a custom encryption key and communicate it to other people only via secure channels. Click "Learn More" to learn more about how and when you should use encryption.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.void_stone.pa.description: One could expect the artifact bearing such a loud name to be anything... Anything, apart from inventory cleaner.<br2/>And yet, that still remains its primary, and probably the only real purpose. At least, beyond any arguing, it totally excels at it. This unique relic could be bound with one or few types of items or blocks. While remaining in your inventory,

if you require, adjusting each of them exactly as you wish. The only practical drawback of this thing is that you can't remove only one item from the list of consumable ones - it's only possible to clear the list entirely if you wish to expel or displace something, so make your choices wisely.<br2/>For now, you have no idea where items absorbed by this relic are sent. You only know that they never come back...

it will consume those items, in the way that depends on mode you've chosen. You only need a sample of the object, so that through simple manipulations to allow it to deliver you from all such objects... Or from their excess, at least.<br2/>You may seek and claim several more keystones

Fortunately, so far it haven't attempted to absorb parts of your body, and it's unlikely that the keystone can somehow interact with living matter at all.<br2/>Yet still, every touch to it awakens a vague anxiety within you.

gui.xaero_box_category_list_add.description:
Supports player names, entity/item identifiers or patterns with special characters * ) ( and |. 
 
 * - matches anything. 
 )( - parenthesis, mostly for usage with |. 
 | - the OR operator to match different sequences in the same location. 
 
 For example: 
 minecraft:creeper 
 minecraft:zombie(_villager|_horse) - zombie villagers and horses. 
 minecraft:a*l - any vanilla entity which starts with 'a' and ends with 'l'.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.spellstones.p.description: were released into the previously cold and dark nothingness. Interacting, fighting and consuming each other, bringing an absolute chaos. In that chaos they were born, encapsulating it in form stable enough to survive eons. Eons upon eons, until your advent...<br2/>By now, it's impossible to come across one naturally. It seems all of them were located and claimed by ancient civilization that now ceased to exist,
leaving behind only the ruins of their creations.<br2/>And among those ruins they lie, awaiting some brave explorer to harness their power.

Spellstones are different enough from most other relics you may discover.<br2/>They are the source and vessels of powerful elemental magic, bestowing their bearers powers beyond human reach. In modern times, there is no known ways to recreate them - origin of spellstones falls back to the first moments of creation, when insane energies

After careful consideration, you decided to add it to the brewing process as an attempt.<br2/>After tasting, although it is too cold, you find that there is no feeling of coldness in your body. Instead, it allows you to feel the power from those cold air in the snowy mountains and glaciers.
Ultimately, you will gain the ability to immune freeze and be able to apply a cold aura to others, and deal more damage to those frozen targets.

modernfix.option.mixin.perf.cache_upgrad.description: All versions. Many mods ship outdated structure files, which requires the game to upgrade them using DFU every single time they are loaded. This can be quite slow. This patch adds logic to instead save the upgraded version of the structure, and reuse it on the next load. To handle the case that the mod changes a structure file but not the name, the original file's hash is compared against the cached version, and if they do not match the structure will be upgraded again.

gui.xaero_box_pushbox_boss_health.description:
An invisible box around the vanilla boss health display that pushes the mod's interfaces out of the way. 
 
 Normal type's collision box is equal to its size and only pushes interfaces by the necessary distance. 
 
 Screen Height type's collision box is stretched across the whole screen height and always shifts colliding interfaces vertically by the Normal type's height. This can be very useful when you have multiple interfaces in a column and want all of them to be pushed.

entity_model_features.config.variable_ex.description:
Entity variables are specified in the format "var.<name>" (float) or "varb.<name>" (boolean) 

The name can be any string, for example "var.xyz", "var.last_rx", etc.

The variable is attached to the rendered entity and has a default value 0 or false.

Entity variables are useful for storing animation data between frames.

After acknowledging so many legends about it, you were surprised to discover this relic just lying around in the midst of nameless ruins. Lost among worthless garbage and trinkets - as if there was nothing special to it.<br2/>It has proven to be just as useless as you did expect  from those legends, however. The Grail is always filled

with water, no matter how much you drink from it, it would remain just as full as it was. But that water has a bitter taste of ashes, and is tainted and poisonous. gui.xaero_teleport_not_connected.description: You are trying to teleport to a sub-world that is not connected to the current auto one. goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.8.description: Being summoned is always awkward. Do I bow? Do I curse your bloodline? I never quite remember the protocol.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: Disinfecting by fire? For most undead, flames are indeed terrifying. But you know—death doesn't burn.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.9.description: Ah, back among the living. Or... what passes for it. Did someone call for a necromancy expert? Or just the neighborhood's most stylish skeleton?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: First Flamebearer? Cute title. Let me show you what happens to the 'First' when you've got eternity to wait for the 'Last'.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.4.description: Back from the death, slightly crispy, fully motivated. Who's next on our list of people who need to learn some manners?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.5.description: You know, most powerful beings get to stay dead. I'm starting to feel personally attacked.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.6.description: You know what they say: what doesn't kill you... just makes you find a new body and carry on.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.spawn.7.description: Ancient beasts and mighty wizards get their beauty sleep. Meanwhile, I'm here, running an undead kingdom on spite. Maybe... maybe this is my curse?

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.mining_charm..description: through it, but at least it can make those hours slightly less dark and boringly long. It grants powers that would make any miner jealous, allowing you to tear blocks apart significantly faster than you could otherwise, see in dark

as clearly as in daylight, and be able to reach things with your pickaxe from much further away.<br2/>It might also shift the odds just a bit in your favor in your search of treasures... probably. Maybe that part was only rumors, after all.

Most of this world's valuable metals and minerals are hidden deep below its surface. book.enigmaticaddons.entry.quartz_scepte.description: The same material but different recipe gave birth to a brand new scepter. Using the magic of materials to transform into a dagger and thrust forward, although the power is not very strong, it is at least a non consumable means.<br2/>In addition, in the Nether, it is inevitable that objects will fall and burn, so this scepter, with its ability to absorb
items, can show off its skills in certain situations.<br2/>Given the magical power of magic quartz, similar items can have a certain impact. Why not try wearing a Magic Quartz Ring and compare it.

book.enigmaticaddons.entry.violence_scro.description: In the endless slaughter, the pleasure brought by violence makes you linger. And the Scroll of Thousand Curses has extended an invitation to you, allowing you to carry the power of the curse and reach the peak together with the abyss.<br2/>Faced with the thirst for violence, the more we fight, the braver and crazier we
become, constantly counterattacking in the midst of injury, and unleashing the accumulated anger.
As an upgrade of the Thousand Curses and the Devoured Malignancy, this object still holds a thirst for the curse. Please satisfy it, it will not mistreat you.

- '#标签' (如 #forge:ores)
- '@模组' (如 @create)

- "@minecraft" (原版物品产出翻倍)

This feature provides extension options
on how Minecraft renders the
'Jacket' layer of your skin
(the second layer that floats above your body)
and allows it to go up to 8 pixels further down.
Typical uses could be for jackets,
dresses, villager cloaks and robes.
The texturing is extremely straight forward,
if enabled this feature will
 copy or move the contents of the top of
the legs floating skin layers and
 use them to build the extension.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.earth_heart.p.description: The elemental power this heart holds bears resemblance to that stored within spellstones, but unlike latter it isn't originated from primordial chaos that spelled the beginning of all worlds, instead being born much later, slowly condensating in the earth's crust during many geological eons.

Similar to how there is Heart of the Sea, an item bound with nature of endless oceans and seas covering surface of the Overworld, there is Heart of the Earth, born within its rocky depths and encapsulating some of their raw energy. It can be found in deepest rooms and halls of dungeons deep below the Overworld's surface, lost and forgotten in smothering darkness.

The resulting shape doesn't attend its bearer and does not allow to freely channel unrefined energy stored within, but may serve as core for powerful relics requiring such energy if utilized properly.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.avarice_scrol.description:
One another relic harnessing the boundless strength of the Seven Curses, this elegant scroll is designed to fulfill the boundless inner greed you so carefully conceal within your soul.
Its primary effect is an ability to confuse minds of the creatures you trade or barter with, into misguessing true price and benefit of the deal... much in your favor.

Piglins seem to be most affected by this ability, with their helpless affection by gold. Not only this allows the scroll to overcome the effect of the Second Curse and render them neutral in your regard, as they normally are

as you can get from their little avid person.<br2/>Apart from this, you also get a slight chance of having an entire Emerald materialize into existence right from within your avaricious dreams whenever you happen to slay any living creature, and <&l>+1 Fortune Level<clear/> which will doubtlessly help you get your hands on some more riches anytime you feel like descending into the mines.

book.enigmaticlegacy.category.armor.desc.description: Despite all its beauty, this world has many dangers lurking in its darkest corners. Many can easily obliterate unaware traveler, if one doesn't have proper means of protection.<br2/>Many legendary blacksmiths dedicated their lives to attempts of creating perfect armor. You will, no doubt, surpass them all.

book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.astral_tree.description: utilizing the astral and the ender power to complete a simple grafting.<br2/>But ordinary soil cannot allow it to grow, and even rich soil can only make it grow into short plants, but you have no other choice.

Looking at the celestial fruit in hand, its taste flashed through your mind. Regardless of where this memory came from, you decided to keep it for more research, in order to regenerate this delicacy in the world.<br2/>Given that celestial fruits resemble apples, you have decided to use oak trees as the target for grafting,
In addition to providing endless celestial fruits, the astral tree also has many practical by-products such as bark and leaves. To food or accessories, they can be further developed.
Celestial fruits require a long process of flowering and fruiting, and generally cannot be ripened through ripening unless you have the ability to manipulate the time.

The leaves with a sense of tranquility feels like a good ingredient for brewing tea, paired with milk and honey, a simple but effective calming tea is made.
In terms of taste, completely different from the Potion of Cosmic.
When it comes to the wood itself, astral wood products are more resilient than ordinary wood products and are not easily ignited by flames. Regardless of aesthetics, practicality still exists.

<&n><&8>Notes of enchantments:<&8>
Sharpness
- Increase the damage of throwing spear.Piercing
- Increase piercing times and slightly improve tracking capability.
a astral explosion.<br2/>Astral dust has also alienated its enchanting ability, why not try some enchantments that do not belong to swords?

The power of astral dust converged at the spearhead, allowing the spear to interact with energy in space. Thus, it can perceive and track every target. And it also can store energy, quickly pierce through and pour out energy, producing

Looking at all the etherium tools, it seems that none of them can reach the enemies hovering above your head, so it's time to think about how powerful astral dust really is.<br2/>Using the Etherium Sword as the base, extending the handle, sharpening the spearhead, and finally injecting the magic of astral dust, a special spear is born.

entity_model_features.config.texture_ove.description:
This controls how EMF handles rendering sub-models that have an override texture set
for example if a creeper model has a separate texture for the head sub-model
There are two ways to do this, rely on my code, or rely on a quirk of the Iris mod
My code 'works' but I am not an expert with render buffers and it may cause issues
The Iris quirk uses a pretty straightforward and seemingly safe/stable method but i'm told its not intended Iris behaviour
The Iris option will default to the EMF code if Iris isn't installed
this should almost always be left on default except when debugging texture overrides in sub-models

gui.xaero_box_pushbox_potion_effects.description:
An invisible box around the vanilla potion effects display that pushes the mod's interfaces out of the way. 
 
 Normal type's collision box is equal to its size and only pushes interfaces by the necessary distance. 
 
 Screen Height type's collision box is stretched across the whole screen height and always shifts colliding interfaces vertically by the Normal type's height. This can be very useful when you have multiple interfaces in a column and want all of them to be pushed.

as of v4.4 this property also allows comparing additional block properties as per the OptiFine spec here https://optifine.readthedocs.io/syntax.html#blocks-and-items

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.ceaseless_enc.description: It does only work on regular arrows, however - tipped arrows or fireworks are not affected by Ceaseless enchantment, and will be used up as normal.
Sharpshooter does only affect arrows - it will not increase damage of fireworks, for instance.<br2/>Furthermore, it cannot be combined with Multishot or Piercing.

Another possible crossbow enchantment, fairly useful in its simplicity.<br2/>Its effects are basically identical to that of Infinity enchantment on bows. With this enchantment on your crossbow, regular arrows from your inventory will not be consumed when shooting them, so that you won't have to worry about restocking your supply.<br2/>

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.lore_inscribe.description: The Architect's Inkwell is a wonderful tool for writing text. It can conjure colors vivid as the starlight, and symbols inscribed with it can never be erased, unless you completely destroy they surface they reside upon.<br2/>To actually make use out of it, you will first require to create Lore Fragment - special type of parchment that
The inkwell allows to access GUI similar to the above.

Put your Lore Fragment in the input slot <&c><&l>(1)$(clear). You will then be able to spell desired name and lore in the text field <&c><&l>(3)$(clear) above it.<br2/>There is a number of special formatting codes that will not be included as a part of visible text, but will instead allow to affect color/font formatting of any following writing, or specify operation that you want to perform with the text line.
perfectly fits to contain your writings.<br2/>These fragments can store the text on their own, but you can transfer the writings you inscribed upon them on virtually any other item,
conveying them to any human or demigod that may come to hold them in a way much more exquisite than primitive engravement.<br2/>Following pages contain more detailed usage instructions.

advancements.goety.haunting_scroll.descr.description: Read the Haunting Scroll and discover the way of haunting.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.lore_inscribe.description: Color and font codes, unlike operational codes, can be entered anywhere in the text field, and will apply their effect to all text that goes in the field after them. When using a color code, it will change color of all following text to the one it represents. If it is followed by another color code later, that last one will override the effect of all previous ones for everything that goes after it; this allows to use multiple colors for different words or parts of

inventoryprofiles.config.description.hig.description: The color used when highlighting the whole slot.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.lore_inscribe.description: the text in the line. The last color code entered will always take effect over anything that follows it, until it is overridden by another color.<br2/>Font codes, on the other hand, do not override one another and thus can be stacked together with one another, and with color codes if specified after them. For instance, you can use "<&5><&l>&4&l&o$(clear)" to create <&4><&l><&o>Dark Red + Bolded + Italic$(clear) text style after it.

If you want your text line to be added as a lore line instead of item name, prefix it with "<&5><&l>!$(clear)". Every line of lore added has incremental index that defines its position among other lore lines. Indexing starts with <&l>0$(clear).<br2/>If you want to replace lore line at specific index, you can specify the index after "<&5><&l>!$(clear)" symbol. For instance, if you want to replace third lore line on the fragment with the line you're adding, prefix will

look like "<&5><&l>!2$(clear)".<br2/>If you want to remove the last lore line added, simply enter "<&5><&l>-!$(clear)" in the text field. If you instead want to erase lore line at given index, specify that index right after the "<&5><&l>-!$(clear)". For instance, if you want to erase fifth line of lore, you will have to enter "<&5><&l>-!4$(clear)".<br2/>When you enter text line with no operational code as prefix, it will be used to rename the item.

If that was the end of it - perhaps, to submit yourself to such fate and perpetually suffer their nightmarish onslaught would become nothing more than another part of your routine, and you would bear it with acceptance you have achieved in bearing all other curses.<br2/>If only... Now that The End beckons you to meet its challenges, traverse its lands and claim its treasures, the Endermen have become an

unbendable desire to decimate your being. Before long, you have accepted that to restore neutral relations with them is by all means an impossible undertaking, and abandoned any and every attempt to achieve such.

One of the toughest lessons you have learned ever since first equipping Ring of the Seven Curses is that Endermen are no longer able to tolerate your existence. book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.cursed_stone..description: reach deep within your soul, intertwining your immortal being with entity of the ring itself, and thus all curses and blessings it yields.<br2/>This connection between you is exactly what makes it so

persistent, inseparable from you even in death. As much as to certain extent you are able to draw and harness power from within the ring, the ring is capable of drawing power from within you in order to reinforce its physical form, as well as the link tightly holding that form on your finger. The only thing it seems to remain barely susceptible to would appear to be extreme heat, but that connection ensures it cannot be permanently destroyed without

Ever since you have chosen to bear the Ring of the Seven Curses, you pondered the possibility of getting rid of it - if not to actually do this, then at least to be aware if it exists. Though materials it is forged from are by no measure indestructible, physical incarnation of the ring is just a mere fraction of its metaphysical power and nature. Tendrils of its corruption

climbing cliffs and ledges to look down from them - until you discover an ocean of seething lava beneath your feet, as vast and deep as you can find. Hold your breath for a while, before releasing it for the last time, and leap into the midst of blazing ocean below, letting your body drown into the molten rock and be consumed by fire.<br2/>Should everything be executed correctly, the ring shall melt and be destroyed forever.

The liberation from its chains doesn't come cheap, however - it is only possible because you expose part of your soul entangled with it through the Unholy Stone. In order for this ritual to be successful, that part must be destroyed first, otherwise it would simply not be possible. But at least with this sacrifice made you will never see that cursed ring again... unless of course it would turn out there was more than one in your world, which is not very likely.

your own body being destroyed just as permanently. And since you apparently possess the ability to create and inhabit new vessel after destruction of the old one, the ring does either.<br2/>However, now that you defeated the Wither and harvested sheer essence of its corrupted soul, the possibility to surmount such obstacle revealed itself. The Unholy Stone symbolizes the connection between you and Ring of the Seven Curses,

manifested and exposed in somewhat fragile physical form for as long as you keep the stone close to you. This allows you to exploit ring's only vulnerability, by willingly meeting your demise in specific, somewhat ritualistic manner.<br2/>With this stone at your disposal, travel to the dimension of blazing heat and lost souls, known as the Nether. Wander amongst its blasted, twisted landscape,

config.entity_texture_features.property_.description:
NBT 
Select whether a mob must have matching NBT data values
Note: this is an OptiFine feature that has not yet received official documentation,
ETF has copied the syntax listed in https://optifine.readthedocs.io/syntax.html#nbt for now.
NBT requires an additional value in the key this is called <nbtPath>.
- nbtPath must match the exact name of the nbt element and is case-sensitive
- nbtPath supports matching nested nbt elements by defining the full nbt path with '.' marking a separation
- E.G. the Villager profession level nbtPath is "VillagerData.level" meaning the full property key would be "nbt.<n>.VillagerData.level"
NBT can be used in several ways see this link https://optifine.readthedocs.io/syntax.html#nbt for details
Additionally ETF adds a variation to the "raw:" syntax called "print_raw:" which will act just like "raw:" but will
also print what that raw value is to the log for testing purposes,
ETF also allows you to start the string with "print:" to always print the full NBT data of the entity
§anbt.<n>.<nbtPath>=<exists:|raw:|print_raw:|print:|range:|regex:|iregex:|pattern:|ipattern:|string_list>

entity_model_features.config.variable_ex.description:
Model variables are specified in the format
 "<model>.<variable_name>"

The model can be:
 "this" - current custom model
 "part" - the original part model to which the custom model is attached
 "<part>" - original model by part name
 "<id>" - custom model by ID
 "<part>:<sub_id>:<sub_sub_id>:..." - (hierarchical) start with original model by part name, then find children by ID
 "<id>:<sub_id>:<sub_sub_id>:..." - (hierarchical) start with model by ID, then find children by ID

The first model found by part name or ID is used if there are duplicates.
The model search by ID is deep, also when used in a hierarchical specification. 

The hierarchical specification allows model groups (json part models) to be reused for different parts. 
For example one hand model ("shoulder:upper_arm:elbow:forearm:palm:finger[1.5]" can be used for both left and right hand.
The animation can use "left_hand:finger1" for the left thumb and "right_hand:finger1" for the right thumb. 
The intermediate parents in the hierarchical specification can be skipped. 

Variable names
 tx, ty, tz    - Translation x, y, z
 rx, ry, rz    - Rotation x, y, z
 sx, sy, sz    - Scale x, y, z
 visible       - Show model and submodels (boolean)
 visible_boxes - Show model only, does not affect submodels (boolean)

modernui.center.font.fallbackFonts.toolt.description:
A set of fallback font families for the default typeface list.
Outline fonts (TrueType/OpenType) are supported, each line can be one of the following two cases:
1) Font family name in English for registered fonts, for instance: Segoe UI
2) Path for font files on your PC, for instance: ../../Fonts/Andy Bold.ttf

entity_model_features.config.function_ex.description:
nbt(x,y)
Boolean function that returns true if the entity has the NBT tag x matching the query y.
x is equivalent to what comes after 'nbt.<n>.' in the NBT random property.
y is equivalent to what comes after the '=' in the NBT random property.
e.g. 'nbt.1.SleepingX=exists:true' in the NBT property will be 'nbt(SleepingX,exists:true) in the animation function'.

book.enigmaticlegacy.entry.curse_transpo.description: Bearing the Seven Curses, you have acquired ability to draw power from curses bound to some of the ancient gear you find in your explorations, and even create such yourself with the help of Enchanter's Pearl. But they still are a great nuisance at times, as even though you can transpose them from one item from another, so far you had no way of separating them from
enchantments when doing so.<br2/>With this little invention, however, your curse management abilities should improve significantly. It offers a way to separate curses and only curses from any item of
your equipment; not a cheap one at that, but a way nonetheless.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: I killed... that? A Brood Mother? You're sure it wasn't just an overgrown silverfish with anger issues?

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_enemy.description: They came, they saw, they got conquered. Classic.
Another one bites the dust! Get it? Because skeletons don't have... oh never mind, my humor is too advanced for the living.
Look at them crumble. Literally. I love it when they do that.
They put up a fight. A very short, very pointless fight.
Rest in pieces! Get it? Because they... oh, you got it the first time. Smart audience.
Another victory for the undead! We're really racking up the bodies. Literally racking them. In piles.
Even in death, there's always a bigger fish. Or in this case, a bigger pile of bones.
Ah, the sweet sound of bones rattling in victory. Music to my... non-existent ears.
Are you grinding? Probably. Or you're just lazy and can't fight him on your own. Oh well.

goetyawaken.namelessone.quote.kill_speci.description: A Redstone Golem? Pfft. Just a big, angry rock with placing mines issues. The illagers stole the blueprint, but they forgot to steal a personality to go with it.
